name: Ubiquiti UNAS Pro 8
title: Ubiquiti UNAS Pro 8
short_description: High-performance 2U rack-mountable NAS system with eight drive bays, two M.2 NVMe slots, dual 10G SFP+ ports, and hot-swappable power modules.
description: The Ubiquiti UNAS Pro 8 is a high-performance, 2U rack-mountable Network Attached Storage (NAS) system designed for enterprise environments requiring substantial storage capacity and fast data access. It features eight 2.5"/3.5" drive bays and two M.2 NVMe SSD slots, allowing for flexible storage configurations and the option to implement SSD caching for enhanced performance. The device is equipped with two 10G SFP+ ports and one 10G/5G/2.5G/1G/100M RJ45 port, providing high-speed networking capabilities to support large-scale file storage and sharing needs. The SGCC steel enclosure ensures durability, while the 1.3" touchscreen display offers an intuitive interface for system management. With a maximum power consumption of 250W and hot-swappable 550W AC/DC power modules, the UNAS Pro 8 is built for reliability and scalability in demanding IT infrastructures.

detailed_description.heading: Robust Network Storage Solution
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UNAS Pro 8 is a high-performance, 2U rack-mountable Network Attached Storage (NAS) system designed for enterprise environments requiring substantial storage capacity and fast data access. It features eight 2.5"/3.5" drive bays and two M.2 NVMe SSD slots, allowing for flexible storage configurations and the option to implement SSD caching for enhanced performance. The device is equipped with two 10G SFP+ ports and one 10G/5G/2.5G/1G/100M RJ45 port, providing high-speed networking capabilities to support large-scale file storage and sharing needs. The SGCC steel enclosure ensures durability, while the 1.3" touchscreen display offers an intuitive interface for system management. With a maximum power consumption of 250W and hot-swappable 550W AC/DC power modules, the UNAS Pro 8 is built for reliability and scalability in demanding IT infrastructures.

detailed_description.heading: Reliable Performance
detailed_description.text: The UNAS Pro 8 is powered by a quad-core ARM® Cortex®-A57 processor running at 2.0 GHz and comes with 16 GB of RAM, providing the processing power required for enterprise-grade storage tasks. This combination allows the system to handle large amounts of data, multiple concurrent users, and high-speed file transfers efficiently. The system supports two M.2 NVMe SSDs, which can be configured for caching, improving read and write speeds for frequently accessed data and enhancing overall storage performance. With a maximum drive power budget of 225 W, the UNAS Pro 8 accommodates a variety of high-capacity HDDs and SSDs, enabling flexible storage configurations to meet growing business demands. Its advanced hardware ensures that applications such as virtualization, media production, large-scale backups, and other data-intensive workloads run smoothly, providing reliability and consistency in enterprise environments while maintaining high throughput across the network.

detailed_description.heading: Durability and Easy Installation
detailed_description.text: The UNAS Pro 8 features a 2U rack-mountable SGCC steel chassis, offering robust protection for internal components and ensuring long-term durability in professional environments. The system supports a wide operating temperature range from -5°C to 40°C and a 100–240 V AC input, making it compatible with various power environments around the world. The device includes dual 550 W AC/DC power modules, which are hot-swappable, providing true redundancy and helping to minimize downtime in case of power supply issues. The internal layout is designed for easy access to the storage components, allowing straightforward maintenance and upgrades. Smart cooling and fan management maintain optimal operating temperatures while keeping noise low. Together with high-speed networking via two 10G SFP+ ports and one 10G RJ45 port, these features make the UNAS Pro 8 a reliable, scalable, and flexible storage solution for enterprises and professional data centers.
